title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server for running large language models locally with a simple API and model registry.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server, published to npm as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, installable via PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: jmorganca/ollama
summary: PyPI landing page for the official ollama Python package.

title: ollama
summary: npm registry page for the official ollama JavaScript package.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package adding Ollama LLM & embeddings wrappers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama models, written in SvelteKit.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop client for Ollama, cross-platform macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing an idiomatic client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, featuring syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds local AI code completion via Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai letting you use Ollama models as Generators or Embedders.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async streaming chat APIs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of Modelfile definitions for Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, etc.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama containers for testing.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s REST API with GenServer-based process management.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models through Slack threads.
